definition: phase of the 1X relative shaft vibration related to a reference point of time

definition_ml.en: phase of the 1X relative shaft vibration related to a reference point of time
definition_ml.de: Phase der 1X-relativen Wellenschwingung bezogen auf einen Referenzzeitpunkt

note: The reference point of time for the phase is defined by a so called phase reference sensor.

note_ml.en: The reference point of time for the phase is defined by a so called phase reference sensor.
note_ml.de: Der Referenzzeitpunkt wird mittels eines sogenannten Phasenreferenzgebers festgelegt.
